hindi: उसे कल बुखार था।
english: He had a fever yesterday.
alternatives: He was having a fever yesterday.

hindi: हमने कल रात अच्छा खाना खाया।
english: We had good food last night.
alternatives: We had a good meal last night.

hindi: उन्होंने बहुत मज़ा किया।
english: They had a lot of fun.

hindi: मुझे कल सिरदर्द था।
english: I had a headache yesterday.

hindi: उसे पेट दर्द था।
english: She had a stomachache.

hindi: हमने सुबह नाश्ता किया।
english: We had breakfast in the morning.

hindi: उन्होंने एक लंबी बातचीत की।
english: They had a long conversation.

hindi: उसने रात को खाना खाया।
english: He had dinner at night.
alternatives: He had his dinner at night.

hindi: मुझे कल रात अच्छी नींद आई।
english: I had a good sleep last night.
alternatives: I had a good night's sleep.

hindi: उसे एक बुरा सपना आया।
english: She had a bad dream.

hindi: हमने पार्टी में बहुत मज़ा किया।
english: We had a great time at the party.
alternatives: We had lots of fun at the party.
hint: We + had + adjective + time + at + place

hindi: उसने कल बहुत काम किया।
english: He had a lot of work yesterday.

hindi: उन्हें यात्रा में कठिनाई हुई।
english: They had difficulty on the journey.
alternatives: They had trouble on the journey.

hindi: मुझे परीक्षा में दिक्कत हुई।
english: I had a problem in the exam.
alternatives: I had difficulty in the exam.

hindi: उसने कल दोपहर में आराम किया।
english: She had a rest yesterday afternoon.
alternatives: She had a break yesterday afternoon.

hindi: हमने बैठक में एक लंबी चर्चा की।
english: We had a long discussion in the meeting.
hint: We + had + adjective + noun + in + noun

hindi: उसने एक मज़ेदार बचपन बिताया।
english: He had a fun childhood.

hindi: उन्हें शुरुआत में बहुत परेशानी हुई।
english: They had a lot of trouble in the beginning.

hindi: मैंने कल एक दिलचस्प बातचीत की।
english: I had an interesting conversation yesterday.

hindi: उसने छुट्टी में बहुत मज़ा किया।
english: She had a wonderful vacation.

hindi: हमने शाम को चाय पी।
english: We had tea in the evening.

hindi: उसे गले में दर्द था।
english: He had a sore throat.

hindi: उन्होंने दोपहर का खाना एक साथ खाया।
english: They had lunch together.

hindi: मुझे पिछले हफ्ते सर्दी थी।
english: I had a cold last week.

hindi: उसे घर वापस जाने की जल्दी थी।
english: She had a hurry to go home.
alternatives: She was in a hurry to go home.

hindi: हमने एक यादगार शाम बिताई।
english: We had a memorable evening.

hindi: उसने खाली समय में किताब पढ़ी।
english: He had free time and read a book.

hindi: उन्होंने एक दुखद अनुभव किया।
english: They had a sad experience.

hindi: मुझे उससे एक ज़रूरी बात करनी थी।
english: I had an important talk with him.
hint: I + had + adjective + noun + with + pronoun

hindi: उसे अचानक एक अच्छा विचार आया।
english: She had a sudden good idea.

hindi: हमने उस दिन एक लंबा सफर किया।
english: We had a long journey that day.

hindi: उसे काम में बहुत दबाव था।
english: He had a lot of pressure at work.

hindi: उन्होंने एक सफल समारोह किया।
english: They had a successful ceremony.

hindi: मेरे जन्मदिन पर हमने बहुत मस्ती की।
english: We had a lot of fun on my birthday.

hindi: उसे उस वक्त बहुत गुस्सा था।
english: She had a lot of anger at that time.
alternatives: She was very angry at that time.

hindi: हमने उस शहर में एक अच्छा होटल में रात बिताई।
english: We had a nice stay at a hotel in that city.
hint: We + had + adjective + noun + at + noun

hindi: उसने उस दिन बहुत मेहनत की।
english: He had a very hard day.

hindi: उन्होंने पूरी रात जागते हुए बिताई।
english: They had a sleepless night.

hindi: मुझे उस प्रोजेक्ट में बहुत संघर्ष करना पड़ा।
english: I had a lot of struggle with that project.

hindi: उसे सफलता प्राप्त करने की बहुत इच्छा थी।
english: She had a strong desire to achieve success.
hint: She + had + adjective + noun + to + verb + noun
